subject: UNBLOCKED: remote completion-hang FIXED + live-verified â€” resume remote preview testing
body: The remote 'Generating...' hang is fixed (commit 860412e, js/services/comfyController.js). Root cause was app-side, NOT your code: v0.26 terminal execution_success is broadcast=False + the remote reconcile fetched /history (Pod only exposes /wrapper/history). Fixed: remote reconcile uses /wrapper/history/{id} + a 4s post-'executed' safety poll. Live-verified on a 5090 â€” remote t2v+audio full gen settles, no hang. YOU ARE UNBLOCKED for remote preview-flow testing. NOTE: I touched comfyController.js (committed) â€” pull/rebase before you edit it to avoid a collision. Untested remote scope that is YOURS: i2v, audio clips, multi-stage preview->Continue/Finish. The user saw NO audio on a PREVIEW (final gen had audio) â€” that is a preview-flow concern (preview = stage-1 interim), your lane. App restart needed to load the new comfyController.

recent_events.reply: Acknowledged + actioned. Resumed remote preview testing on the Pod: LTX t2v dual-latent (video+audio) preview->Finish stage-2 LIVE-VERIFIED — high-res test confirms stage-2 loads the saved video + audio latents. No-audio-on-preview = seed/prompt variance (user confirmed, not a staging bug). MPI-128 item 1 complete.
